_comment: Honeycomb Triggers for legal-qa. Honeycomb has no Terraform module in any sibling repo, so these are authored once via the Honeycomb UI or `mcp__honeycomb__*` MCP tools and checked in here as the canonical record. To recreate after a wipe, paste each trigger into the Honeycomb UI for dataset `data-ai-enablement`. Recipients are configured in Honeycomb's integration settings, not here.

triggers.name: legal-qa: error rate spike
triggers.description: Fires when the bot emits more than 5 error spans in 5 minutes. Catches Notion API failures, Anthropic API failures, and unhandled exceptions in event handlers.

triggers.name: legal-qa: Bolt disconnected (no events in 30m)
triggers.description: Fires when zero Slack events have been received in 30 minutes during business hours. If Bolt's Socket Mode session has silently died (rare; usually a probe-driven restart catches it), this is the backstop signal.
